items.title: Here’s What Analysts Think About Amazon.com (AMZN)
items.description: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the best stocks to buy in 2026 for beginners. On January 15, Raymond James cut the price target on Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) to $260 from $275 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares, telling investors that the Q4 outlook appears positive due to favorable ad checks, strong holiday […]

items.title: Inside Amazon’s secret move to challenge Walmart’s strength
items.description: Walmart has one massive advantage over Amazon: its huge store fleet. Observations suggest Amazon’s online recommendation engine is less effective at driving unplanned purchases, compared with the experience of browsing a physical Walmart store. Currently, Amazon has been showing me guitars for ...

items.title: 'A broadening playbook': Wall Street sees stock market gains beyond tech
items.description: Enthusiasm for artificial intelligence's prospects will continue to drive the market higher in 2026. The gains won't be limited to tech stocks, strategists say.

items.title: Mark Cuban Pushes Back On The Idea That Success Was Easier In The Past. Says He Graduated Into 20% Unemployment And 15% Interest Rates
items.description: Mark Cuban is no stranger to tough beginnings. In a recent exchange on Bluesky, the billionaire entrepreneur reminded followers that his path to wealth wasn't paved with ideal conditions. “When I graduated from college the unemployment rate in the state was 20pct and interest rates were 15pct,” he wrote. “I slept on the floor for almost 2 years.” Cuban Says Class Mobility Has Never Been Easy The conversation kicked off when a user challenged Cuban's claim that he could still build wealth today b

items.title: I Predicted Nvidia Was a Better Dow Stock Than Amazon in 2025, and I Was Right. But Which Is the Better "Magnificent Seven" Stock for 2026?
items.description: Wall Street is underestimating the growth potential of Nvidia's Rubin architecture.
